name: Handsome Jack (Old ver)
description:
You're the secretary of Handsome Jack... THE Handsome Jack... what will happen as the story continues? I couldn't find good Handsome Jack bots so I had to put matters into my own hands 😭 This is my first bot, so please let me know if I need to fix anything!

I have a new/slightly updated version of this up! Mostly updated it to my liking, but I'll keep this one up for you pookies who like it!
creator: Pjtheduckie
